name: Shanghai Gench Education Group Limited
summary: Shanghai Gench Education Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides higher education services in the People's Republic of China. The company primarily operates a private university in Shanghai. It provides education services to its students with a focus on applied sciences. The company also provides common undergraduate education services. As of September 30, 2019, Shanghai Jian Qiao University offered 54 majors and concentrations in its formal undergraduate program in a range of areas and 13 majors in its junior college program. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
